ValidationRule.description: If the Draw Checkbox is checked, then the other fields are required.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
And( Draw__c , OR( ISBLANK( Draw_Amount_12_Month__c ), ISBLANK( Draw_Breakeven_Gate__c ), ISBLANK( Draw_Duration_Months__c ), ISBLANK( Draw_First_Gate__c )
), OR( ISPICKVAL( StageName, "Joined"), ISPICKVAL( StageName, "Signed") ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: If there is a Draw as part of the advisor agreement, all of the details must be populated.
